case_title: GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK VS. TONYA THOMPSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS [CCP 1033] FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $287.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, TONYA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON, TONYA $6,194.41 PRINCIPAL, $287.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,481.91, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION /AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, TONYA DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-24-2012
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK SERVED JUL-02-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, TONYA
